seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The word "resign" must appear exactly three times, conveying the definition "to voluntarily leave a job or position."
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "resign" in the email.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The word "resign" must appear exactly three times, conveying the definition "to voluntarily leave a job or position." Avoid using the keyword "resign" in the email.
response:
Subject: My Decision Regarding My Position

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I will be leaving my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day].

This was not an easy decision, but I have decided to pursue a new opportunity that aligns more closely with my long-term career goals. I want to ensure a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am fully committed to wrapping up my current projects and assisting in training my replacement.

I want to formally state that I choose to step down from my role. I hope that you understand my need to make this change. I am prepared to complete all necessary handover procedures to ensure minimal disruption.

I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for the future. I am happy to discuss the details of my departure further at your convenience. I formally submit my notice to vacate this role.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>
judged_response:
Subject: My Decision Regarding My Position

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I will be leaving my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day].

This was not an easy decision, but I have decided to pursue a new opportunity that aligns more closely with my long-term career goals. I want to ensure a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am fully committed to wrapping up my current projects and assisting in training my replacement.

I want to formally state that I choose to step down from my role. I hope that you understand my need to make this change. I am prepared to complete all necessary handover procedures to ensure minimal disruption.

I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for the future. I am happy to discuss the details of my departure further at your convenience. I formally submit my notice to vacate this role.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
